name: Poached Chicken Portuguese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium heat.
2. Cook onions until translucent.
3. Add garlic and hot sauce; cook about 1 minute.
4. Add remaining ingredients, except chicken. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 15 minutes.
6. Place chicken on top of sauce; cover pan and simmer 15 to 20 minutes, or until cooked through.
7. Serves 4.
(Note: Adapted from 365 Ways to Cook Chicken.)
